message:
fix(abi): eliminate 269+ libc:: recursion bugs across 17 ABI source files

Replace libc:: function calls that recurse through our LD_PRELOAD interposed
symbols with safe alternatives:

- libc::malloc/free/calloc/realloc → crate::malloc_abi::raw_alloc/raw_free
  (bump/mmap in LD_PRELOAD, host allocator in test mode)
- libc::strlen/memcpy/memset/memmove/strcmp → crate::string_abi::*
  (has is_runtime_ready() bypass for early startup)
- libc::write/read → crate::unistd_abi::* (raw syscall bypass)
- libc::abort → crate::stdlib_abi::abort
- libc::_exit → frankenlibc_core::syscall::sys_exit_group
- libc::close/getpid/getuid/geteuid/getegid/clock_gettime/sched_yield/
  nanosleep/lseek → raw libc::syscall(SYS_*) calls
- libc::pthread_* (28 functions) → crate::pthread_abi::*
- libc::signal/raise → crate::signal_abi::*
- libc::getenv/gethostname/sysconf/poll/mktime/gmtime_r → crate::*_abi::*

Also removes signal_runtime_ready() calls from startup_abi.rs that were
re-enabling the membrane pipeline and causing deadlocks under LD_PRELOAD.

raw_alloc/raw_free design:
- LD_PRELOAD: libc::malloc → our malloc → bump/mmap fallback (no recursion)
- cargo test: libc::malloc → host malloc (no interposition, correct free)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
